description: Test-coverage policy. Filters the ideal matrix produced by coverage-analyzer.mts. This is NOT runtime configuration — it only shapes which (base, addon-combo, task) cells the analyzer enumerates and reports as gaps.

addon-acme.description: ACME only matters in nginx (only consumer). Test solo, never in combinations.

samba-shares.description: Samba addon currently unused — exclude from the matrix until adoption.

proxmox.description: Host-only app (hidden, reconfigure-only). Tested with the full oidc+ssl combo since that's the realistic deployment.

npm-nodejs.description: Deprecated framework — no live tests planned. Pending full removal from json/applications and json/frameworks.
